description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

We've updated how bus routes and systems are displayed, including route numbers on each bus service.

• Bus services now show route numbers — Timetables and countdowns now display route numbers (like Hanno 01, Hanno 03-2) alongside service names like "Naguri Line." This makes it easier to match the numbers shown on the bus and in guides.

• Route names now show destinations and stops — Services are labeled with stops and destinations included, such as "Naguri Line via Arima Dam to Nago." We removed redundant "Hanno Station to..." prefixes.

• Odekake Mooma shuttle split by district — "Seimei/Kaji Mooma" is now divided into three services: "Kaji Mooma," "Seimei East Mooma," and "Seimei West Mooma," making it clearer which areas each service covers.

• Service selection screen improved — Route name and system appear on the left with departure times on the right. Final stop and arrival time are also shown. After selecting a stop, headers are hidden for a cleaner display.

• Seibu Bus Misugi Daisen line reorganized to official system names, and late-night services now shown — Destination names for the Misugi Daiden area now match official names (Misugi Daiten New Town / UA Caster before / Crown Package before), and late-night services previously not shown are now displayed.
